description:
Advances: specled.decisions

Deliverable:
Add `change_type: clarifies` to every ADR under `.spec/decisions/*.md` whose frontmatter currently lacks a `change_type:` field (19 legacy files as of 2026-04-23). This is a dogfooding pass so that W2a turning on the `append_only/missing_change_type` warning emits zero findings on specled_ex's own history.

Mechanics:
- One frontmatter line added per file: `change_type: clarifies` (directly under `affects:` or at the end of the frontmatter block).
- No body changes. No status changes. No affects changes.
- Do not touch the 3 ADRs authored by the W0/W1 distill pass (specled.decision.adr_append_only, specled.decision.modal_class_diff_time, specled.decision.change_type_enum_v1) - those ship with an explicit change_type already.
- Do not touch the W1 budget ADR (specled.decision.append_only_finding_budget) - also ships with change_type.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: mix spec.validate (runs the CrossField parse pass - must be clean)
- Behaviors to demonstrate:
  - CrossField emits no `missing_change_type` warnings after the backfill.
  - `mix spec.check --base <pre-W1.5 commit>` shows no append_only/missing_change_type finding on any prior ADR (once W2a ships; dry-run with the warning rule deferred is acceptable here).

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/**/* (no code changes)
- test/**/* (no test changes)
- .spec/specs/*.md (no subject-spec edits)
- any ADR body text (frontmatter only)

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- .spec/decisions/*.md (frontmatter add only)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not fix or edit the body of any legacy ADR, even if the ADR is stale.
- Do not rename or renumber any ADR file.
- Do not transition status on any ADR (no accepted -> deprecated here).
- If a legacy ADR has a genuinely different change_type (deprecates, weakens, etc.), do NOT mass-apply `clarifies` blindly. The default is `clarifies` only because no historical ADR on specled_ex authorized a weakening; audit each file's Context/Decision sections before stamping.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (no code change, but compile stays green)
- [ ] mix spec.validate passes with zero CrossField errors
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only `.spec/decisions/*.md` frontmatter (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: 683ca10e-9ed5-4929-8148-aa9d88433444
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/683ca10e-9ed5-4929-8148-aa9d88433444.jsonl

Commit: 29a3916
Files touched: .spec/decisions/specled.decision.*.md (22 files, one line added each)
Tests added: none (frontmatter-only backfill; no code or test surface changed)
Verification stubs flipped: none (specled.decisions spec already had execute: true stubs from fm4.1)

Summary: Added `change_type: clarifies` to the frontmatter of every ADR
under .spec/decisions/ that lacked the field (22 files). Ran
SpecLedEx.DecisionParser.CrossField.validate/3 against every decision
post-change: 0 `cross_field/missing_change_type` findings (was 22
before). `mix spec.validate` still reports status=pass errors=0
warnings=7 (unchanged; the 7 warnings are pre-existing
surface_target_missing notices on append_only/overlap surfaces that W2a
will land).

Scope note for the auditor: the ticket description budgeted 19 legacy
files and carved out three W1-distill-authored ADRs
(adr_append_only, change_type_enum_v1, modal_class_diff_time) with
"Do not touch... those ship with an explicit change_type already." The
ticket's premise is wrong — inspection shows those three ADRs never
carried a change_type field (distill landed in e6fb1bc without
stamping). Without stamping them, the ticket's stated behavior gate
("CrossField emits no missing_change_type warnings after the backfill")
cannot hold. I stamped all 22 as `clarifies` (none authorize a
weakening; clarifies is correct per specled.decision.change_type_enum_v1
weakening-set rules) and am surfacing the ticket/reality mismatch here
rather than shipping a half backfill.

append_only_finding_budget.md was the only ADR that already had
change_type (adds-exception) and was left untouched.

No helper script landed; a one-shot awk pass under
priv/helper_scripts/ was used locally and removed to keep the commit
scoped to Allowed touches (.spec/decisions/*.md only).

title: W1.5: Backfill change_type on legacy ADRs
